name: Job Market Trust Infrastructure Model
author: Market Catalyst - Job Market
description: Job Market Trust Infrastructure: structured hiring transparency, promises, reviews, and verification.

entities.name: verification
entities.brief: Verification and anti-gamification data for reviews
entities.description:
Cross-verification data, manipulation detection, and evidence weighting
for reviews. This implements the Verification & Anti-Gamification Layer
that ensures data reliability. Includes cross-referencing for consistency,
weighting by verifiability, and detection of coordinated manipulation.

fields.name: review_id
fields.description: Reference to the review being verified

fields.name: is_consistent
fields.description: Whether review is consistent with other reports

fields.name: verifiability_weight
fields.description: Weight assigned based on verifiability (0.0 to 1.0)

fields.name: manipulation_risk_score
fields.description: Risk score for manipulation (0.0 = low risk, 1.0 = high risk)

fields.name: cross_reference_count
fields.description: Number of other reviews that cross-reference this one
